QueryExtension.SQL: SELECT CP.CODE AS "CP.CODE", CP.PARTY_ID AS "CP.PARTY_ID", CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE", CP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR WHERE CPR.PARTY_ID = CP.PARTY_ID ) AS "CPR.COUNT" FROM CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE CP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode} AND CP.CODE = ${param.codedPartyCode}

Security.roles: wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan
